description:
No Exhaust — Johnsons Motorcar. CD album (2008), all songs produced, arranged, and recorded by Johnsons Motorcar. Cover art: a gas-mask / smoke motif; the disc has a colorful smoke-swirl design. A small-press, self-produced indie release.

**Why a new owner would be happy**

- Small-press indie music — not something you'll find in shops.

**Condition:** in jewel case, appears used.
name: No Exhaust — Johnsons Motorcar
